name: PUROLATORINTERNATIONAL.COM
message: [AI generated] Purolator International is a leading provider of cross-border logistics solutions services. Based in Jericho, NY, it specializes in offering air and ground freight forwarding services, customs brokerage, package and freight services, and logistics solutions. Operated by Canada’s leading integrated freight, package and logistics solutions provider, Purolator Inc., the company focuses on delivering exceptional services to, from and within Canada.
